details.reasoning: Comprehensive and well-executed implementation that meets all rubric requirements. The agent successfully: (1) created a new json_path constraint system with json_path_to_schema.py providing JSONPath parsing and JSON Schema generation; (2) added proper validation in gen() API ensuring json_path starts with '$'; (3) registered json_path across the constraint system (grammar_manager, base_grammar_backend, protocol layers, sampling_params); (4) integrated json_path into IR definitions (SglSamplingParams, SglGen, SamplingParams); (5) followed existing patterns consistent with json_schema and regex constraints. The implementation includes comprehensive unit tests with 13 test cases covering normal cases and error scenarios. Minor deduction only because potential edge cases in real-world constraint validation and schema generation cannot be fully verified from code inspection alone.
